name: analytics-data-dictionary-block
title: Data Dictionary
description: Data Dictionary block for the Agent-Native Analytics workspace shell.

lifecycle.migrationNotes: Generated standalone block descriptor plus mounted React block route evidence from the authored workspace shell.
